stem: A scatterplot shows the relationship between x and y. A line of best fit passes through (0, 1.20) and (10, 6.20). Which of the following is closest to the slope of the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Slope = (6.20 − 1.20)/(10 − 0) = 5.00/10 = 0.50.

Choices B and D are intercept or endpoint values. Choice C reflects forgetting to divide by the run.
